title: WORLD VETERINARY DAY 2026 LAWM
content:
293/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 25th April, 2026 :Animal Husbandry & Veterinary (A.H&Vety.) Department, Mizoram State Veterinary Council (MSVC) leh Indian Veterinary Association (IVA) Mizoramte tangkawp buatsaihin vawiin khan Mc Cabe Hall, Aijal Club-ah "Veterinarians: Guardians of Food and Health" tih thupui hmangin 'World Veterinary Day (WVD) 2026' lawm a ni. He hunah hian Pu Lalsangliana, Secretary, A.H & Vety. Department chu Khuallian niin, Dr. Lalremliana, President, MSVC chu Khualzahawm a ni.

Khuallian A.H & Vety. Secretary Pu Lalsangliana chuan IVA member zawng zawngte World Veterinary Day pual chibai bukin duhsakna a hlan a. Ei leh bar dehchhuah bakah a hrisel em tih ngaihven thlengin Veterinarian-te an pawimawh thu sawiin, ran hriselna mai piah lamah ram leh hnam hriselna chu an kutah thui tak a innghah thu a sawi a. Veterinary profession chu hna zahawm tak anih thu sawiin, eizawn nana thlang tawhte chu hawi kir lova, tih takzeta thawka an thiamna leh tawnhriatte hmanga danglamna thlentu nih tum turin a chah a ni.

AH& Vety. Secretary chuan Animal Husbandry & Dairying chu Sawrkar laipuiin a ngaih pawimawh thu leh a la tih len deuh deuh dawn thu a sawi a. Department hnuaia thawktute inpekna fakawm a tih thu sawiin, Sawrkar laipui atanga fakna awka dawn a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Ran hmangaihtu mimal leh pawl chawimawi takte chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin, theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. Department nena thawhhona tha chhawmnun zel a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

World Veterinary Day 2026 lawmna hun hi Dr. Robert Rualthankhuma, President, IVA Mizoram chuan kaihruaiin Dr. C. Lalchhandama, General Secretary, IVA-in report a pe a. Khualzahawm Dr. Lalremliana, President, MSVC leh Dr. Lalrotluanga Sailo, Director, AH&Vety. Department-te hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni a. Ran ngaihsaka an hamthatna tura thawk tha mimal leh pawl hrang hrang 10 te hnenah chawimawina thuziak cheimawi hlan a ni a. Member thite sunna hun hman niin, kum 2026-2028 chhung atana IVA Mizoram hruaitu tur thlan a ni bawk a. Dr. Suzanne Malsawmthangi, Treasurer, IVA-in lawmthu sawiin hun hman a khar a ni.

Hemi hma hian Dr. V. Lalzarzova, Vice President, IVA kaihhruaiin Ran Doctor-te tana intuaitharna hun hman a ni a. Dr. Lallawmzuali Ralte, Associate Professor, College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry (CVSc&AH), Selesihin "Veterinary Council of India - Standard of Professional Conduct, Etiquette & Code of Ethics for Veterinary Practitioners Regulations, 1992" tih thupui hmangin zirtirna a pe a. Dr. Joy Lalmuanpuia, Assistant Professor, CVSc&AH, Selesihin kumin thupui "Veterinarians : Gaurdians of Food and Health" tih hmangin zirtirna a pe bawk.

World Veterinary Day 2026 pual hian vawiin chawhma khan Aizawla hmun pathum - State Veterinary Polyclinic Hospital, Khatla, Thuampui leh Lawipu-ahte Free Health Clinic leh Free Anti-Rabies Vaccination Camp-te buatsaih a ni a. Ran engemawzah a thlawna entir niin, Ui a hri danna Anti-Rabies Vaccine dose 196 pek a ni a. He ni pual vek hian DDK Aizawlah World Veterinary Day thupui sawi hona neih a ni bawk.

World Veterinary Day hi Mizoramah chuan kum 2012 atang khan kum tin April thla Inrinni hnuhnung berah hman thin a ni a. Ran hriselna venhim leh enkawl bakah, mipui vantlang hriselna venhim kawnga Veterinary Doctor-te pawimawhna leh intuaitharna hun atana hman thin a ni.

Attachment

title: Bawng leh Lawi lakluh/phurh luh chungchanga Lawngtlai Bawrhsap thuchhuah
content:
292/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 25th April 2026 :Lawngtlai District chhunga Bawng leh Lawi lakluh/phurh luh chungchangah a hnuaia mi ang hian Lawngtlai Bawrhsap chain thuchhuah a siam.

ORDER

Tunlai hian kan thenawm ram Myanmar ah bawng/lawi pul hri a leng mek nia thu dawn a ni a. Chuvangin Lawngtlai District chhungah kan ran vulhte a lo him zawk theih nan, ramdang atanga Bawng leh Lawi lakluh hi khap tula hriat a ni.

Chuvangin kei, DONNY LALRUATSANGA, MCS, DISTRICT MAGISTRATE, LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT, LAWNGTLAI chuan Section 165 of Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita (BNSS), 2023 in thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia thupek hi ka chhuah e.

"Mitupawh kan thenawm Myanmar atangin Lawngtlai District chhungah Bawng leh Lawi lakluh/phurhluh khap tlat a ni."

He thupek zawm lo chu Section 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) hmangin hrem theih an ni ang.

He thupek hian Lawngtlai District pum a huam ang a, thu leh awm hma chu tihchhuah a nih atanga thlahnih(2) chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin Date 24/4/2026 hian District Magistrate Seal - a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-

DONNY LALRUATSANGADistrict Magistrate,Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment

title: SAWRKAR HOSPITAL-A DAMDAWI DAWR SIAM CHUNGCHANG
content:
291/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 25th April, 2026 :Hospital-a damdawi zawrhna dawr awm a pawimawh zia chu mitin hriat a ni a, Drugs Rules, 1945 hnuaiah damdawi zawrhna dawr hi siam theih a ni. Sawrkar leh Private Hospital-te dinhmun erawh hemi kawngah hian a inang veklo a ni.

Sawrkar Hospital chu mipui tana din (public institution)a nih angin, mipui hamthatna tura damdawi zawrhna dawr siam hi Drugs Rules, 1945 hnuaiah kawnghnihin a tih thei a, hetiangin :

1. Drugs Licence ngai lova damdawi pek (supply/dispense) theih dan :

Entry 5A of Schedule K of Drugs Rules, 1945 chuan sawrkar hospital-te chu dan phuarna lakah engemawchen a awl (exempt) a. Chumi tlawh chhan chuan sawrkar hospital-ah drugs licence hranpa ngai lovin damdawi zawrhna dawr (dispensing facility)a siam theih ani. Hei hi siam a nih chuan hengte hi zawm ngei a ngai :

i) Pharmacist-in chu hmun chua enkawl ngei tur a ni.

ii) Damdawi Ina damlo awmte(in-patients) leh hospital doctor rawntute(out-patients) hnenah chauh damdawi hralh theih a ni a, pawn lam mi a duh apiangte tana damdawi lei theihna tur a ni lo.

iii) Hei hi retail dawr pangngai ang ni lovin, hospital service atan chauha ni.

iv) Damdawi dawr enkawlna kawng hrang hrangah Drugs Rules an zawm tur a ni a, Drugs Inspector-ten an endik thin ang.

2. Drugs Licence pangngai nei a damdawi zawrh theih dan :Sawrkar Hospital tan Drugs Rules, 1945 hnuaiah drugs licence pek theih a ni bawk. Hospital hotuMedical SuperintendentemawDirectoremaw hminga pek hi, mimal thil leh mimal sumdawnna a nih loh avangin danah a remlohna a awm lo va, State Licensing Authority-in Sawrkar Hospital dinhmun thlirin licence pek theiha a ngaihte a pe thin a, hetiang licence hi sawrkar hospital engemawzat ah pek a ni tawh a ni. Hengte hi damdawi dawr dinhmun tur chu a ni :

i) Pharmacist enkawlna hnuai a awm a ni ngei tur a ni a, hospital-a sawrkar pharmacist thawk lai te chu Pharmacist In-charge anga pawm nghal theih an ni. Pharmacist full-time-a thawk tur lak an nih pawhin pawm a rem lohna a awm lo.

ii) Damdawi Ina damlo(in-patients)leh a pantute (out-patients)bakah, retail dawr pangngai angin pawn lam atanga damdawi lei duh apiangte hnenah prescription an neih ang zia zelin damdawi hralh theih a ni bawk.

iii) Kawng engkimah Drugs Rules, 1945 an zawm tur a ni a, a tul angin Drugs Inspector-ten an endik thin ang.

Sd/-

F.LalliantluangaJt. Director of Health ServicesFood and Drug Administration(FDA)Directorate of Health ServicesMINECO, Aizawl, Mizoram

title: KOLASIB DC IN THINGDAWLA SAWRKAR HMUN PAWIMAWH TE TLAWHIN JNV VMC MEETING A HMANPUI
content:
290/2026-2027

Kolasib, 24th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Thingdawl-a sawrkar hmun pawimawh hrang hrang a tlawh kual a. Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya (JNV), Thingdawlah Vidyalaya Management Advisory Committee (VMAC) Meeting a hmanpui bawk.

DC hova JNV Thingdawl-a VMAC meeting (2026-27) neihah hian agenda pawimawh tak tak - zirlai lak luh (admission) dinhmun, board leh non-board exam result, School building construction, tui harsatna, assembly ground leh infiamna mual (sports ground) tihzauh chungchang te uluk taka sawiho a ni. Tarlan danin, JNV-ah hian session 2025-26 chhungin zirlai 77 ten admission an ti a. Class 10 board exam-ah 100% pass percentage hmu in, Class 12 result hi nghah mek a ni.

Kolasib DC chuan tualchhung mite hnena JNV pawimawhna thehdarh (awareness) a tul thu a tarlang a. Zirlaite Hindi tawng thiam kawngah leh zirna bakah thiam thil dang (co-curricular activities) ah te hma an sawn chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, sikul tha taka enkawltu Principal Pu Hari Om Shukla chungah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Hemi hnu hian DC chuan Thingdawla Veterinary Farm a tlawh a, District Veterinary Officer (DVO) in lo dawngsawngin Kolasib District-a ran vulh lam hmasawn dan tur te an sawiho a ni. DVO hian National Highway 4-lane laih mekin Veterinary ram a rawn tan tlang chungchanga an harsatnate DC hnenah hian a lo thlen nghal bawk.

District Agriculture Centre tlawh chhunzawmin, District Agriculture Officer leh Block Agriculture Officer ten an lo dawngsawng a. Lab hmanga alu chi tha leh a tiak siamchhuahna hmun (Tissue culture/Apical rooted cutting& Aeroponics system) te a hmunah enfiahin, agriculture hmasawn zel dan tur an sawiho.

DC hian Horticulture Centre of Excellence, Thingdawl a tlawh chhunzawm leh a. He hunah hian thawktuten an hnathawh mek te, thei, pangpar leh thlai tiak an chin (nursery) leh an enkawl dan te chu powerpoint presentation hmangin an lo hrilhfiah a. Presentation neih zawh hian DC chuan a hmunah tlawh nghalin an hnathawh thatak avanga lawmthu hrilhin, hma sawn zel turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawiina DC in hmun hrang hrang a fankualna ah hian DIPRO, Pu David A Lalhmingchhuana'n a tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District-ah vohbikte tan Disability Certificate/UDID Assessment & Certification Camp buatsaih a ni
content:
289/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 24 :Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department leh Health & Family Welfare Department te ṭang kawp hma laknain vohbikte (Persons with Disabilities) tan Disability Certificate/UDID Assessment & Certification Camp chu April ni 22–24, 2026 chhung khan Lunglei District chhunga Thenhlum, Lungsen–II leh Tlabungah te buatsaih a ni.

He Assessment & Certification Camp-ah hian Bunghmun, Lungsen leh Tlabung RD Block chhunga khaw 39 aṭangin vohbik mi 303 te chu Disability Certificate/UDID pe chhuak tura endik an ni a. Vohbikte zinga Aadhaar siam ṭhat (update) ngaite chu siam ṭhatsak nghal an ni bawk.

Vohbikte tana buatsaih Assessment & Certification Camp hi Sr Specialist (Orthopedician) Dr Joseph Lalrindika Chawngthu kaihhruaina hnuaia kalpui niin, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Department  staff-te, Zoram Medical College & Hospital, Falkawn aṭanga Medical Team te, Civil Hospital Lunglei aṭanga Medical team te, Bunghmun ICDS Project aṭang leh Tlabung RD Block aṭanga Aadhaar Enrolment Operator te an tel.

Attachment
